title: Del (disambiguation)
content:
'''Del''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Del Goren]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] [[Communications Officer|comms]] [[officer]]
*'''[[Del Meeko]]''', a former [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[agent]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Del (clone trooper)|Del]]''', a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] in the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion's]] [[Torrent Company/Legends|Torrent Company]]
*[[Del (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|'''''Del''''']], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|'''''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport''']] group
*[[Del (Rebel)|'''Del''']], a member of the Alliance's [[Brak Sector Force]]
*'''[[Del Sato]]''' of the [[Core Courier Service]]
*'''[[Del Moomo]]''', an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]

==[[In-universe|Out-of-Universe]]==
*'''[[Del Rey]]''', a publishing company

{{Disambig}}
